summary: Make the import/check subcommand stubs real: clap args, defaults, dispatch into import::run and check::run with all_rules(), error-driven exit code.

edit.description: Import { harness_path: PathBuf, --into <workspace> default ./.author }; Check { workspace: Option<PathBuf> default ./.author }. Dispatch: Import -> import::run; Check -> Workspace::load, check::run(&ws, &rules::all_rules()), check::render diagnostics, exit non-zero via check::any_error. Keep main a thin clap dispatch (logic stays in lib).

tests.asserts: import then check over a fixture exits zero on a clean skill and non-zero when an error-severity rule fires; --into / workspace defaults resolve to ./.author.

acceptance: `author import <fixture> --into <tmp>` then `author check <tmp>` runs end to end with the documented exit semantics.
notes: import::run + check::{run,render,any_error} + Workspace::load are all on disk; CLI is the rule-registration site, so engine and rules stay decoupled. No new dep; drive lib functions (assert_cmd optional, would need a Cargo edit).

summary: Slice-1 acceptance: insta snapshots of import + check over a trimmed coordinate fixture, plus the import-idempotence (no-diff) check.

new.description: insta snapshot of the import surface over a trimmed copy of the coordinate skill (stable across re-runs); insta snapshot of check diagnostics over the rules fixtures (the expected diagnostic set); assert re-running import yields no diff.
Trimmed real-shaped coordinate skill (SKILL.md + a companion) used as the import golden fixture.

tests.asserts: import surface snapshot is byte-stable across two runs; check over the fixtures reproduces the expected diagnostic set; import-then-import produces no diff.

acceptance: The slice acceptance from the spec passes: import <fixture> --into <tmp>, check <tmp> reproduces the expected diagnostics, and re-import produces no diff; `cargo test` green.
notes: Drives the lib import/check functions (logic lives in lib per rust.md) so no binary harness/dep is needed. Trimmed fixture only — do not copy the full ~/.claude/skills/coordinate.
